Institutional DeFi Protocol

Not more information. Better judgment. Deployed as capital.

In a world where AI floods every channel with noise, the scarce resource is clarity. CometCloud is a private intelligence protocol that filters, scores, and structures the signal — then lets rational allocators act on it.

See How It Works Open Platform
01
We don't show you everything.
We show you what affects your portfolio. The rest is filtered out before it reaches you.
02
Our standard is the product.
CIS scoring and GP evaluation are the same framework we apply to our own protocol allocation.
03
Intelligence earns the right to hold capital.
We build trust through judgment first. Capital follows conviction.
Architecture

Three layers. One thesis.

Each layer builds on the last. Intelligence creates conviction. Conviction enables allocation. Allocation demands service.

I
Layer One
Intelligence

The signal layer. We score every asset, every GP, every macro event through a consistent framework — CIS (CometCloud Intelligence Score) — so that institutional allocators can compare across classes without re-learning a new methodology for every decision.

CIS: 5-pillar scoring across Fundamental, Market Structure, On-Chain Health, Sentiment, and Alpha Independence
GP Evaluation: 100-point framework for quantitative crypto fund selection
RWA Analytics: tokenized asset intelligence across private credit, treasuries, real estate
Macro Signal: curated events that can move institutional capital — nothing more
II
Layer Two
Protocol

The capital layer. When conviction is high enough, allocators don't just watch — they deploy. CometCloud Protocol lets institutional capital restake against our own scoring framework, with on-chain risk parameters derived directly from CIS. We only accept allocation where our own intelligence supports it.

Vault infrastructure: institution-grade fund-of-funds deployment
Risk parameters set by CIS scores, not manual curation
Transparent on-chain allocation — every position traceable to a CIS signal
Staged AUM growth: credibility before scale
III
Layer Three
Service Network

The relationship layer. This is where DeFi finally closes the gap with private banking. Not just yield — judgment, access, and presence. A global network of practitioners who understand both TradFi and on-chain, serving allocators across Hong Kong, Singapore, and beyond.

Private banking experience replicated in Web3 — community, not just dashboards
Cross-border access: HK SFC and SG MAS regulatory awareness built in
Harvest Fund network and EST Alpha as founding institutional relationships
Human judgment where AI cannot reach — GP relationships, regulatory dialogue
Why Now

The window is
2025–2027.

Institutional crypto is no longer a question of if — it's a question of infrastructure. BlackRock, Franklin Templeton, Standard Chartered are already allocating. The gap they cannot fill is intelligence that crosses TradFi and on-chain simultaneously.

RWA tokenization is projected to reach $30 trillion by 2034. The tools that earn institutional trust in the next 24 months will define the rails the rest of the decade runs on.

AI has commoditized data retrieval. What cannot be commoditized is judgment shaped by institutional experience — knowing which signal matters in this market, for this allocator, at this moment.

$30T
Projected RWA Market by 2034
Standard Chartered projection
76%
Institutional investors increasing crypto exposure
2025 survey data
5%
Confident in blockchain risk assessment
The gap CometCloud closes
Audience

Built for rational allocators.

Not for traders chasing momentum. For institutional decision-makers who need to justify conviction with a framework.

◈
Quantitative Funds
Systematic strategies need systematic intelligence. CIS gives quant teams a scoring API that feeds directly into allocation models without manual research.
◆
Family Offices
High-conviction, low-frequency allocators who want to understand crypto without building an internal research team. We are that team.
◇
Institutional LPs
Sovereign wealth, endowments, and fund-of-funds evaluating crypto GP managers. Our 100-point evaluation framework is the due diligence standard.
Our Philosophy

In an age where AI creates infinite noise, the only advantage worth paying for is selective silence.

We reduce entropy. We don't add to it.

Access

CometCloud is in private access.

Institutional allocators, GPs, and RWA partners — reach out directly.
